Control.Comment: The TOE is required to provide obscured feedback to the user while authentication is in progress.

Control.name: Access Enforcement: Restrict Access to Specific Information Types
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE restricts access to administrative credentials, which supports the control to the extent that such a repository is identified by the organization as requiring restricted access.

Control.name: Authenticator Management
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE protects authentication data from unauthorized disclosure, in support of part (h) of this control.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Protection of Authenticators
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE must have the ability to securely store passwords and other credential data it uses.

Control.name: Protection of Information at Rest: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses a cryptographic mechanism to prevent credential data at rest from being stored in plaintext.

Control.name: Non-repudiation
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports enforcement of this control by providing proof of receipt for CMC or EST data.

Control.name: Non-repudiation: Association of Identities
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE binds its identity to proof of receipt using digital signature.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses HTTPS to protect CMC data in transit.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses HTTPS to protect CMC data in transit.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE acts as a CMC server as part of the certificate issuance process.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses HTTPS to protect CMC data in transit.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses HTTPS to protect CMC data in transit.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE acts as a CMC client as part of the certificate issuance process.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses TLS to protect EST data in transit.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses TLS to protect EST data in transit.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE acts as an EST server as part of the certificate issuance process.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses TLS to protect EST data in transit.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses TLS to protect EST data in transit.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE acts as an EST client as part of the certificate issuance process.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: This function supports behavior related to certificate issuance.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Public Key-Based Authentication
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports enforcement of part (a) of this control by serving as a mechanism where certificate status information can be authoritatively checked.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Public Key-Based Authentication
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports enforcement of part (a) of this control by serving as a mechanism where certificate status information can be authoritatively checked.

Control.name: Device Identification and Authentication: Cryptographic Bidirectional Authentication
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE may support the enforcement of this control if any protocols used to establish trusted communications use mutual authentication.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE has the ability to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of information transmitted between the TOE and another trusted IT product.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE supports a cryptographic method of protecting data in transit.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Public Key-Based Authentication
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE may support the implementation of PKI-based authentication by validating peer certificates as part of the authentication process.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE has the ability to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of information transmitted between the TOE and another trusted IT product.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE supports a cryptographic method of protecting data in transit.

Control.name: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE provides cryptographic methods to secure data in transit, which may satisfy organization-defined uses if the functionality claimed by the TSF is consistent with organizational requirements.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Public Key-Based Authentication
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE implements peer authentication for IPsec.

Control.name: Boundary Protection: Deny by Default - Allow by Exception
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE's IPsec implementation includes a default-deny posture in its SPD.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE implements IPsec as a method of ensuring confidentiality and integrity of data in transit.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE's use of IPsec provides a cryptographic means to protect data in transit.

Control.name: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE provides cryptographic methods to secure data in transit, which may satisfy organization-defined uses if the functionality claimed by the TSF is consistent with organizational requirements.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Public Key-Based Authentication
Control.Comment: The TOE requires peers to possess a valid certificate before establishing trusted communications, supporting this control.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE has the ability to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of information transmitted between the TOE and another trusted IT product.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE supports a cryptographic method of protecting data in transit.

Control.name: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE provides cryptographic methods to secure data in transit, which may satisfy organization-defined uses if the functionality claimed by the TSF is consistent with organizational requirements.

Control.name: Authenticator Management: Public Key-Based Authentication
Control.Comment: The TOE provides a server certificate to a TLS client before establishing trusted communications, supporting this control.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE has the ability to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of information transmitted between the TOE and another trusted IT product.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE supports a cryptographic method of protecting data in transit.

Control.name: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: The TOE provides cryptographic methods to secure data in transit, which may satisfy organization-defined uses if the functionality claimed by the TSF is consistent with organizational requirements.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE will support this control by providing a protected communication channel between remote distributed TOE components.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE will use cryptographic methods to protect data in transit between different parts of the TOE.

Control.name: Authenticator Management
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE uses pre-shared keys as a type of authenticator and will ensure their strength and confidentiality, which supports parts (c) and (h) of this control.

SFRMapping.name: Basic Internal TSF Data Transfer Protection

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE will support this control by providing a protected communication channel between remote distributed TOE components.

Control.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity: Cryptographic Protection
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE will use cryptographic methods to protect data in transit between different parts of the TOE.

Control.name: Access Enforcement
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports the enforcement of this control by limiting key share access to individual authorized users.

Control.name: Separation of Duties
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports the enforcement of this control by ensuring that each key share is only accessible by a single privileged user.

Control.name: Access Enforcement: Dual Authorization
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports the enforcement of this control by requiring dual authorization for the export of key data that is used for recovery from TSF failure.

Control.name: System Backup
Control.Comment: A conformant TOE supports the enforcement of part (b) of this control because the key data being exported from the TOE is system-level information that is being stored externally in the case that a recovery from failure is needed. Part (d) is enforced through the use of split knowledge procedures that ensure the confidentiality of this data is maintained while outside the TOE boundary.

SFRMapping.name: EST Client use of TLS-unique value

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: This function supports behavior related to certificate issuance.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: This function supports behavior related to certificate issuance.

Control.name: Public Key Infrastructure Certificates
Control.Comment: This function supports behavior related to certificate issuance.
